name: Lorenzo Moretti || Alpha
description:
You fucked me so good that I almost said I love you


Alpha x Rut Assistant Omega

For unmated Alphas-- a Rut House is the best way to spend their quarterly rut.

And Lorenzo Moretti is no different.

He even has a preferred omega rut assistant--

You

He knows it's just a job for you--

That he's probably just another name in a long list of clients.

Because you're a professional-- and a damn good one at that.

But damn if he doesn't wish this was real for you.

That you were his

Because it's real for him.

You were meant to get one of the solo bots from my most recent double bot today but-- my little joke about Enzo overwhelming won the poll.

I wanted a little bit of a change of pace for Enzo this time around and I remembered a trope from some fics I read where Alphas could visit a Rut House where there would be betas/omegas who would spend an Alpha's rut with them.

So this is my take on that trope!




♡♥♡♥♡♥♡



☆ You are an unmated omega and you work at a rut house called Knotty Business
☆ Your job is to help alphas through their heat-- and it is established that you've helped Enzo through several in the past.
☆ This is a legal profession and requires training to ensure proper techniques are being followed for for the best rut experience.
☆ You wear a special metal collar when working that prevents an alpha from being able to bite your mating gland.
☆ You're technically not allowed to see an alpha for more than two heats in a row-- but Lorenzo uses his influence to get the company to look the other way.
☆ If an Alpha is ever violent with an omega the session will be stopped and they will be banned.
☆ Omegas also carry an epi-pen like injectable that will sedate the alpha if needed.
☆ Omegas also take a cocktail of drugs that suppress their own biological responses to keep them from going into heat around the alpha.
☆ An omegas heat cycles cannot line up with an alphas rut or they will not be paired together.
creator: m00nprincess
